name: sharppilot
description: SharpPilot is a quality assurance extension for Visual Studio Code that leverages an MCP server to enable model-invokable tools and curated, configurable instructions—elevating code quality, workflows, and overall developer productivity with Copilot.

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with SharpPilot
walkthroughs.description: Learn how SharpPilot enhances GitHub Copilot with curated instructions and MCP tools.

steps.title: Welcome to SharpPilot
steps.description: Discover how SharpPilot elevates code quality with curated instructions and model-invokable tools.

steps.title: Chat Instructions
steps.description:
Enable instruction sets that guide Copilot's responses for your tech stack.
[Toggle Instructions](command:sharppilot.toggleInstructions)

steps.title: MCP Tools
steps.description:
Enable quality-assurance tools that Copilot can call in agent mode.
[Toggle Tools](command:sharppilot.toggleTools)

steps.title: Auto Configure
steps.description:
Let SharpPilot detect your workspace and enable the right instructions and tools.
[Auto Configure](command:sharppilot.autoConfigure)

steps.title: Export & Browse
steps.description:
Export instruction files to your repository or browse them in the editor.
[Export Instructions](command:sharppilot.exportInstructions)

sharppilot.instructions.codeReview.description: Enable code review guidelines (priority order, feedback style, scope and test coverage checks).

sharppilot.instructions.designPrinciples.description: Enable design principles (SOLID, DI, composition, separation of concerns, structured logging).

sharppilot.instructions.testing.description: Enable general testing guidelines (TDD, AAA structure, single-behavior focus, test isolation).

sharppilot.instructions.docker.description: Enable Docker guidelines (multi-stage builds, security, Compose, layer caching).

sharppilot.instructions.graphql.description: Enable GraphQL guidelines (schema design, pagination, DataLoader, mutations, subscriptions).

sharppilot.instructions.restApiDesign.description: Enable REST API design guidelines (resource naming, HTTP methods, status codes, pagination, error responses, versioning).

sharppilot.instructions.sql.description: Enable SQL guidelines (naming, formatting, query design, indexing, parameters, transactions, NULL handling, performance).

sharppilot.instructions.yaml.description: Enable YAML guidelines (formatting, quoting, type safety, anchors, multi-document, security).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.aspnetCor.description: Enable ASP.NET Core Web API guidelines (middleware, routing, error handling, auth).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.asyncAwai.description: Enable async/await pattern guidelines for .NET code.

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.blazor.description: Enable Blazor component guidelines for Razor files.

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.codingSta.description: Enable .NET coding standards (naming, validation, file organization, API design).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.core.description: Enable .NET Core guidelines (dependency injection, logging, configuration, security).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.dapper.description: Enable Dapper guidelines (connection management, parameterized queries, mapping, transactions, performance).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.entityFra.description: Enable Entity Framework Core guidelines (DbContext lifetime, querying, migrations, bulk operations).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.grpc.description: Enable gRPC guidelines (proto design, status codes, deadlines, streaming, channel reuse).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.nuget.description: Enable NuGet package and dependency guidelines.

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.performan.description: Enable performance and memory optimization guidelines.

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.postgresq.description: Enable PostgreSQL guidelines (security, query design, performance, PL/pgSQL, schema migrations).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.razor.description: Enable Razor file structure and syntax guidelines.

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.redis.description: Enable Redis guidelines (connection multiplexing, key naming, TTL, pub/sub, distributed locking).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.signalR.description: Enable SignalR guidelines (hub design, groups, backplane, reconnection, strongly-typed hubs).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.sqlServer.description: Enable SQL Server guidelines (T-SQL security, query design, performance, stored procedures, schema migrations).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.testing.description: Enable general testing strategy guidelines (TDD, naming, organization).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.maui.description: Enable .NET MAUI guidelines (MVVM, Shell navigation, data binding, layouts, DI).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.mediatorC.description: Enable Mediator/CQRS guidelines (command/query separation, handler design, pipeline behaviors, notifications).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.mongodb.description: Enable MongoDB guidelines (security, data modelling, query design, indexing, transactions).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.mysql.description: Enable MySQL guidelines (security, query design, performance, stored procedures, schema migrations).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.oracle.description: Enable Oracle guidelines (security, query design, performance, PL/SQL, schema migrations).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.sqlite.description: Enable SQLite guidelines (security, query design, performance, WAL mode, schema migrations).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.unity.description: Enable Unity guidelines (MonoBehaviour lifecycle, component caching, physics, coroutines, ScriptableObjects, performance).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.winForms.description: Enable Windows Forms threading, data binding, layout, and lifecycle guidelines.

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.wpf.description: Enable WPF MVVM, data binding, threading, and performance guidelines.

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.xaml.description: Enable XAML guidelines (layout, data binding, resources, templates, accessibility).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.xunit.description: Enable xUnit-specific guidelines (v3 APIs, attributes, assertions).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.mstest.description: Enable MSTest-specific guidelines (attributes, assertions, test lifecycle).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.nunit.description: Enable NUnit-specific guidelines (constraint model, attributes, assertions, test lifecycle).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.csharp.description: Enable C# coding style rules (member ordering, formatting, etc.).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.fsharp.description: Enable F# coding style rules (module layout, naming, type design, pattern matching, formatting).

sharppilot.instructions.dotnet.vbnet.description: Enable VB.NET coding style rules (naming, Option Strict, error handling, formatting).

sharppilot.instructions.scripting.powers.description: Enable PowerShell guidelines (naming, error handling, pipeline design, security, module structure).

sharppilot.instructions.scripting.bash.description: Enable Bash guidelines (safety flags, quoting, error handling, portability, script structure).

sharppilot.instructions.scripting.batch.description: Enable Batch (CMD) guidelines (variable handling, error checking, quoting, script structure).

sharppilot.instructions.web.angular.description: Enable Angular guidelines (standalone components, signals, DI, RxJS, routing, reactive forms).

sharppilot.instructions.web.css.description: Enable CSS layout, theming, selectors, and accessibility guidelines.

sharppilot.instructions.web.html.description: Enable HTML semantics, accessibility, and structure guidelines.

sharppilot.instructions.web.javascript.description: Enable JavaScript language, async patterns, and security guidelines.

sharppilot.instructions.web.nextJs.description: Enable Next.js guidelines (App Router, Server/Client Components, data fetching, rendering strategies).

sharppilot.instructions.web.nodeJs.description: Enable Node.js guidelines (async patterns, module design, security, process lifecycle).

sharppilot.instructions.web.react.description: Enable React component purity, Hooks, state design, effects, and list rendering guidelines.

sharppilot.instructions.web.svelte.description: Enable Svelte guidelines (runes, stores, SvelteKit routing, load functions, form actions).

sharppilot.instructions.web.typescript.description: Enable TypeScript type safety, generics, and anti-pattern guidelines.

sharppilot.instructions.web.vue.description: Enable Vue.js guidelines (Composition API, reactivity, Pinia, Vue Router, component design).

sharppilot.instructions.web.testing.description: Enable general web testing strategy guidelines (test structure, naming, organization).

sharppilot.instructions.web.vitest.description: Enable Vitest guidelines (mocking with vi, snapshots, fake timers).

sharppilot.instructions.web.jest.description: Enable Jest guidelines (mocking, snapshots, fake timers).

sharppilot.instructions.web.jasmine.description: Enable Jasmine guidelines (spies, clock, async assertions, custom matchers).

sharppilot.instructions.web.mocha.description: Enable Mocha guidelines (Sinon mocking, Chai assertions, async patterns).

sharppilot.instructions.web.playwright.description: Enable Playwright guidelines (auto-waiting locators, Page Object Model, web-first assertions).

sharppilot.instructions.web.cypress.description: Enable Cypress guidelines (chainable commands, intercepts, custom commands, session caching).

sharppilot.tools.check_csharp_async_patt.description: Enable the async patterns checker tool.

sharppilot.tools.check_csharp_coding_sty.description: Enable the coding style checker tool.

sharppilot.tools.check_csharp_member_ord.description: Enable the member ordering checker tool.

sharppilot.tools.check_csharp_naming_con.description: Enable the naming conventions checker tool.

sharppilot.tools.check_csharp_nullable_c.description: Enable the nullable context checker tool.

sharppilot.tools.check_csharp_project_st.description: Enable the project structure checker tool.

sharppilot.tools.check_csharp_test_style.description: Enable the test style checker tool.

sharppilot.tools.check_nuget_hygiene.description: Enable the NuGet hygiene checker tool.

sharppilot.tools.check_git_commit_conten.description: Enable the commit content validator tool.

sharppilot.tools.check_git_commit_format.description: Enable the commit format validator tool.

sharppilot.tools.check_typescript_coding.description: Enable the TypeScript coding style checker tool.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: node -e "if(!process.env.SHARPPILOT_VSCE_BYPASS){console.error('Do not run vsce package directly. Use: ./build.ps1 Package');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.test:smoke: npm run compile && tsc -p tests/smoke-tests/tsconfig.json && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('out/tests/smoke-tests/package.json','{\"type\":\"commonjs\"}')" && vscode-test --config tests/.vscode-test.mjs
